name: Peanut Butter-Raisin Bars
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Firmly packed light brown sugar
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan over medium heat, stir together the brown sugar and corn syrup until the sugar dissolves and the mixture is warm.
2. Remove from heat; blend in the peanut butter.
3. Stir in the cereal and raisins until well coated.
4. Press into a lightly greased 8x8 inch baking pan.
5. Cool until firm.
6. Cut into 24 bars.
7. Store in an airtight container.
